common.comingSoonBody: This screen is being built. It will light up in a future update.

storage.title: Storage
storage.subtitle: Vault capacity and per-channel usage.
storage.refreshHint: Refetch on demand · auto-refreshes when a download completes

notice.body: Downloads keep running — TubeVault won’t pause or delete anything on its own.

empty.title: No usage yet
empty.body: Nothing has been archived to the vault. Downloaded videos will appear here, grouped by channel.

error.title: Couldn’t load storage
error.body: We couldn’t reach the server. Check that it’s running and try again.

cleanup.title: Free up space
cleanup.subtitle: Select archived videos to delete and reclaim disk space. The capacity view stays read-only — this is where you act.

reason.noMedia: Nothing to free — this holds no media yet
reason.inProgress: In progress — finish or cancel the job first

empty.title: Nothing to reclaim
empty.body: No downloaded videos are taking up space yet. Once you archive videos, they’ll appear here.

confirm.subtitle: TubeVault sorts each by whether it can be re-downloaded. Review before deleting.
confirm.reclaimDesc: Media deleted — re-downloadable whenever the source is available.
confirm.irreplaceableDesc: Rescued — the only surviving copy. Deleting is permanent.
confirm.typePromptPost: to permanently delete the irreplaceable copies.

secret.keepHint: Leave blank to keep the current secret.
secret.deleteHint: Cleared — saving will delete the stored secret.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.body: This didn't load. You can try again.

search.noMatchBody: Try a different title or channel name.

bell.title: Notifications
bell.errorBody: Check your connection and try again.

queue.title: Queue
queue.subtitle: Downloads in progress, waiting, or recently settled.

reorder.runningLocked: A downloading job can’t be reordered

active.title: Nothing in the queue
active.body: No downloads are waiting or in progress.

failed.title: No failed jobs
failed.body: Downloads that failed will show up here.

completed.title: No completed jobs yet
completed.body: Finished downloads will show up here.

canceled.title: No canceled jobs
canceled.body: Jobs you cancel will show up here.

filtered.title: No jobs match this channel
filtered.body: No queued or recent downloads for the selected channel.

error.title: Couldn’t load the queue
error.body: Something went wrong fetching the queue.

confirm.cancelBody: The job stops and its partial download is discarded. You can re-queue it later.
confirm.bulkCancelBody: Each job stops and its partial download is discarded.

toast.full: The queue is full right now — try again shortly.
toast.resumeFailed: Couldn’t resume the download — it’s still paused. Try again.
toast.resumeLegacy: This job can’t be resumed — cancel it and re-queue instead.
toast.requeueNone: Nothing to queue — already queued or ineligible.

log.title: Event log
log.empty: No events recorded for this job.

home.title: Overview
home.subtitle: Your vault at a glance — what’s running, what’s stored, and what was just preserved.

w1.title: Now running
w1.waitingCapped: View the rest in the queue

empty.title: Nothing running
empty.body: New downloads and live captures will show up here.

empty.title: No archives yet
empty.body: Once you archive videos, your vault use shows up here.

empty.title: Nothing preserved yet
empty.body: Add a channel to start archiving its videos.

error.title: Couldn't load this section
error.desc: The connection dropped. Nothing was lost — try again.

captures.title: In-progress captures
captures.sub: Broadcasts being recorded to the vault right now.

empty.title: No broadcasts in progress
empty.desc: When a watched channel goes live, you'll see it here in real time — you didn't miss anything.

channels.title: Watched channels
channels.sub: Channels TubeVault checks for live broadcasts.
channels.pausedToast: Watch paused — the in-progress capture keeps running.
channels.toggleError: Couldn't update live watching — please try again.

cred.title: Members-only lives need a valid YouTube sign-in — some may not be captured.

empty.title: No channels watched
empty.desc: Turn on live watching for a channel to catch its broadcasts automatically.

recent.title: Recently ended
recent.sub: Live streams that finished and were saved.
recent.reassure: Just-ended lives can take a while to verify — no action needed.

empty.title: No recent recordings
empty.desc: Finished live streams will be listed here once one wraps up.

login.lead: Enter your access secret to continue.

error.malformed: Something was wrong with that request.
error.rate: Too many attempts. Try again shortly.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Everything your archive has done — failures, expirations, and rescues — so you can trust it’s running.

view.helperUnread: Triage inbox · items that may need you

notifications.newActivity_one: {{count}} new notification — refresh to show it
notifications.newActivity_other: {{count}} new notifications — refresh to show them

filter.loadedNote: Filters apply to loaded items — server-side is coming.

markAllConfirm.title: Mark everything read?
markAllConfirm.body: This marks ALL notifications read, not just the ones matching your current filters. Your filters will be cleared.

empty.allBody: Your archive hasn’t logged anything yet. Downloads, source changes, and rescues will appear here.
empty.clearBody: Nothing needs you right now. Everything your archive has done is under All.
empty.filterBody: Try widening the filters. These only span the items loaded so far.

error.title: Couldn’t load the activity log
error.body: This didn’t load. Your archive keeps running in the background — try again.

toast.badCursorBody: The list cursor expired, so the latest activity was reloaded.

empty.channelBody: Nothing has been enumerated for this channel yet. New uploads will appear here as they’re captured.
empty.libraryBody: Register a channel to start archiving. New uploads will appear here as they’re captured.
empty.filteredBody: Try broadening your search, or clear the filters to see the whole archive.

error.title: Couldn’t load videos
error.body: Something went wrong reaching the vault. Your archive is safe — this is just the view.

headline.rescued: Rescued — we saved this copy before the original left YouTube.
headline.HEALTHY: Healthy — your copy is verified, and the original is still online.
headline.VERIFYING: Verifying — checking this copy against the source right now.
headline.AWAITING_VERIFY: Verifying completeness — a just-finished live can take a little while to verify. No action needed.
headline.DOWNLOADING: Downloading — building your preserved copy right now.
headline.QUEUED: Queued — waiting for a download slot.
headline.FAILED: Download failed — the last attempt didn’t finish. You can try again.
headline.PARTIAL_KEPT: Partly saved — the recording was cut short, but a partial copy is kept.
headline.CANDIDATE: Not preserved yet — this is a candidate in your vault.

DOWNLOADING.title: Building your copy
DOWNLOADING.body: Downloading the original now. The preserved file — and its checksum — appear here the moment it verifies.

QUEUED.title: Queued for download
QUEUED.body: Waiting for a free slot. It starts automatically — you can watch its progress here.

FAILED.title: Download didn’t finish
FAILED.body: The last attempt stopped before a copy was saved. Nothing is corrupted — try again to preserve it.

CANDIDATE.title: Not preserved yet
CANDIDATE.body: This video is a candidate — found on the channel but not yet saved. Download it to keep a verified copy before anything happens to the original.

e404.title: This copy’s file couldn’t be read
e404.body: The vault record says this copy is healthy, but the media file didn’t respond — it may have been moved off disk. The status, checksum, and history below are still accurate.

FAILED.title: Retry the download
FAILED.hint: YouTube’s bot wall can cut a download short. Retrying queues it again.

PARTIAL_KEPT.title: This recording
PARTIAL_KEPT.hint: Full re-downloads aren’t offered for past live streams — this partial is the copy we keep.

CANDIDATE.title: Preserve this video
CANDIDATE.hint: Found on the channel but not yet saved. Download it to keep a verified copy.

liveFailed.title: Capture didn’t finish
liveFailed.hint: This live capture failed and can’t be re-downloaded — a past live stream can’t be fetched again.

hint.QUEUED: Waiting for a download slot — it’ll start on its own.
hint.PAUSED: Paused — the partial file is kept. Resume when you’re ready.

rescued.title: Rescued and safe
rescued.body: The original is gone from YouTube — your verified copy is all that remains, and it’s healthy.

ok.title: Preserved and verified
ok.body: A verified copy is safe in the vault. There’s nothing you need to do.

trail.title: History
trail.intro: Every state change, oldest first — the record of how this copy got here.

notFound.title: Video not found
notFound.body: This video isn’t in your vault. It may have been removed.

error.title: Couldn’t load this video
error.body: Something went wrong fetching the details. Try again.

toast.queuedBody: Watch its progress here or in the Queue.
toast.nothingBody: This video isn’t in a state that can be downloaded right now.
toast.liveRefusedBody: A past live recording is final — the partial is the copy we keep. Full control lives in the Queue.
toast.fullBody: Priority space is exhausted right now. Try again in a moment.
toast.controlUnavailable: Controls are briefly unavailable — try again.

channel.notFoundBody: This channel isn’t registered. It may have been deleted.

acquire.candWhy: Candidates aren’t saved until you back them up.

manage.title: Manage channel
manage.note: Per-channel overrides — leave on “Inherit global” to follow Settings.

danger.unregisterDesc: Stops collecting new videos and live streams. Your archive is kept and stays searchable — reversible any time.
danger.purgeDesc: Permanently removes this channel and every preserved file from disk. This cannot be undone.
danger.confirmUnregBody: Collection stops immediately. Your archive stays on disk and searchable — re-register any time to resume.
danger.confirmPurgeBody: This permanently deletes the channel and every preserved file from disk. This cannot be undone. Type DELETE to confirm.

toast.queuedBody: Track progress in Queue or Home.
toast.skippedBody: Already saved or in progress — those copies are safe.
toast.nothingBody: Every eligible video is already saved or queued.
toast.fullBody: The download queue is busy. Try again in a moment.
toast.badRequestBody: Something was off with that request.
toast.unregisteredBody: Collection stopped. Your archive is kept and searchable.
toast.reRegisteredBody: Collection resumed. New uploads and live streams will be captured again.
toast.purgedBody: The channel and its preserved files were permanently removed.
toast.actionFailed: That didn’t work — please try again.

page.title: Channels
page.subtitle: The channels you’re archiving. Register a new one by its URL — TubeVault keeps a copy even if YouTube loses the original.

register.title: Register a channel
register.hint: Paste a channel URL. TubeVault resolves it, then enumerates its videos in the background — you don’t wait here.

notice.successMsg: Enumerating its videos in the background — this can take a few minutes. Track progress in the queue.
notice.alreadyMsg: Re-checking now for new videos. Track progress in the queue.
notice.notFoundMsg: That URL didn’t resolve to a YouTube channel. Check the link — a channel page or @handle URL works best.
notice.timeoutMsg: The lookup timed out before the channel could be resolved. It’s likely temporary — retry.
notice.engineTitle: The archive engine had a problem
notice.engineMsg: TubeVault couldn’t reach YouTube to resolve the channel. Try again in a moment.
notice.genericMsg: Something went wrong resolving the URL. Try again in a moment.

confirm.unregDesc: TubeVault stops downloading new videos and watching for live streams. Everything already archived stays saved and browsable — you can re-register anytime to resume.
confirm.purgeDesc: This permanently deletes the channel and all {{n}} archived video files from disk. This cannot be undone. To keep your copies, use “Stop collecting” instead.

toast.purgeMsg: “{{name}}” and its files were permanently deleted.
toast.actionError: Something went wrong — please try again.

empty.title: No channels yet
empty.desc: Add your first channel by its URL above to start archiving. TubeVault keeps a copy even if the original is later removed.

error.title: Couldn’t load your channels
error.desc: The channel list didn’t load. This won’t affect anything already archived.

page.title: Settings
page.subtitle: Global download defaults, notification channels, and your YouTube credential — each saved on its own.
page.indepNote: Three independent services. A failure in one never blocks the others.

common.secErrDesc: The rest of the page still works — this one can retry on its own.

defaults.title: Download defaults
defaults.desc: Applied to every new download. Changes save to the settings singleton.

concurrency.label: Download concurrency
concurrency.hint: 1 is serial — the polite default that stays gentle on YouTube. Up to 4 at once.

defaults.clamp: Concurrency is capped at 1–4 — saved as {{to}}.

channels.title: Notification channels
channels.desc: Where TubeVault sends alerts. Secrets are write-only — stored masked, never read back.
channels.typeImmutable: Pick a type — it can’t change after the channel is created.
channels.addAllEventsNote: New channels subscribe to all events at Info by default — fine-tune after adding.

empty.title: No channels yet
empty.desc: Add one to get download, live, and rescue alerts where you already look.

form.name: Name
form.mergeHint: Leave a secret blank to keep it · clear it to delete · type to replace.

test.realNote: A real message was sent, and a Test row was added to your notifications.

del.title: Delete this channel?
del.desc: TubeVault will stop sending alerts to “{{name}}”. This can’t be undone.

toast.createdMsg: TubeVault will start sending alerts here.
toast.notFoundDesc: It may have been deleted from another tab. The list has been refreshed.
toast.actionError: Couldn’t update the channel — please try again.

cred.title: Owner YouTube cookie
cred.desc: Lets TubeVault archive members-only and age-restricted videos as you.
cred.willVerify: Imported — a background worker will verify it shortly.

import.label: Paste your Netscape cookie jar
import.hint: Never re-read after saving. Max 1 MiB. Importing resets status to Unverified.
import.placeholder: # Paste your exported Netscape-format cookies here…

disabled.title: Credential storage is disabled
disabled.desc: An operator must configure the credential key on the server (TUBEVAULT_CREDENTIAL_KEY_FILE) before cookies can be imported. Import and delete return 503 until then.

expired.warn: This credential has expired. Members-only live streams won’t be captured until you import a fresh cookie.

del.title: Delete the stored cookie?
del.desc: TubeVault will lose access to members-only and age-restricted videos until you import a new cookie.

session.title: Session
session.desc: Your access secret unlocks a signed session cookie for this browser.
session.ttlNote: Sessions last about 12 hours before you’ll need to sign in again.

library.title: Library
library.subtitle: Every archived video, across all channels.

toast.queuedBody: Track progress in Queue or Home.
toast.skippedBody: Already saved or in progress — those copies are safe.
toast.nothingBody: Every selected video is already saved or queued.
toast.fullBody: The download queue is busy. Try again in a moment.
toast.badRequestBody: Something was off with that request.
